title: BatWorlds Cobblemon
description: The official modpack of the BatWorlds project, for Fabric!
body:
Modpack includes such mods as:
- Cobblemon;
- Regions Unexplored;
- Better Nether+ Better End;
- Minecraft Comes Alive and many more.  

Players get to explore a vast and immersive world, filled with various Pokémon creatures and fascinating custom dimensions generation. The Pokémon mod adds a whole new layer of adventure to the game, allowing players to encounter and collect different Pokémon species as they explore.

The custom dimensions generation feature enhances the exploration aspect of the modpack. It generates unique and diverse dimensions beyond the regular Minecraft world, each with its own set of challenges and rewards. Players can embark on epic quests, discover hidden treasures, and encounter powerful Pokémon within these dimensions.

One of the key aspects of this modpack is its peaceful survival mode. This means that players can enjoy the game without the constant threat of hostile mobs attacking them. It creates a more relaxed and casual atmosphere, focusing on exploration, building, and interacting with the Pokémon world.

BatWorlds Cobblemon server: batworlds.net

Players can collaborate with others, establish Pokémon training centers, build amazing structures, and explore together in this server. The combination of Pokémon mod, custom dimensions, and peaceful survival mode adds depth, creativity, and endless possibilities to the Minecraft experience.

Whether you're a Pokémon enthusiast, an avid explorer, or simply looking for a peaceful and unique Minecraft adventure, this server is sure to provide an engaging and enjoyable experience for players of all ages.
